title: Vanilla Bean
description: A tried and true classic! Made with whole Madagascar vanilla beans, it's the perfect scoop.

title: Chocolate Oreo
description: One of our favorite chocolate ice creams! Addictive Oreo pieces riddled through creamy milk chocolate ice cream-- simple and delicious.

title: Pink Dragon Fruit
description: Our pink dragon fruit ice cream is subtly fruity and sweet, and SO gorgeous. The all-natural hue comes solely from the dragon fruit!

title: The Yellow Jacket
description: Made in honor of our favorite local mascot (hi Sting!). Sweet cream ice cream gets a heavy swirl of our honey-caramel sauce, and riddled with honeycomb-shaped chocolate pieces!

title: Avocado
description: Ultra creamy, mellow, and sweet-- it's a surprisingly delicious scoop.

title: Orange Speckled Chocolate
description: Our favorite citrus/chocolate combo! Creamy orange ice cream and melt-in-your-mouth chocolate flakes make for one tasty treat.

title: Lemon Bar
description: Our addictive lemon-vanilla ice cream with ribbons of housemade lemon curd and sugar cookie crust pieces...one of our favorites!
